samples.xml_description:
<module id="serial2parallel">
    <description>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="din_serial">Serial input data.</input>
        <input id="din_valid">Validity signal for input data.</input>
        <output id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</output>
        <output id="dout_valid">Validity signal for the output data.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter name="cnt">Counter for serial input.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter for serial input.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="dout_valid">Valid signal for parallel output.</reg>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="dout_parallel" width_description="[7:0]">Parallel output data.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <comment>Implement a series-parallel conversion circuit.</comment>
        <sequential>
            <if>
                <true>
                    <text>Reset condition.</text>
                    <set>
                        <object id="cnt" value="4'b0000"/>
                        <object id="dout_valid" value="1'b0"/>
                        <object id="dout_parallel" value="8'b00000000"/>
                    </set>
                </true>
            </if>
            <else>
                <text>Normal operation.</text>
                <if>
                    <true>
                        <text>Valid input.</text>
                        <then>
                            <if>
                                <true>
                                    <text>Count is 0.</text>
                                    <then>
                                        <text>Update cnt and dout_parallel.</text>
                                        <set>
                                            <object id="cnt" value="4'b0001"/>
                                            <object id="dout_parallel" value="{din_serial, dout_parallel[7:1]}"/>
                                        </set>
                                    </then>
                                    <else>
                                        <text>Count is not 0.</text>
                                        <then>
                                            <if>
                                                <true>
                                                    <text>Count is 7.</text>
                                                    <then>
                                                        <text>Update cnt, dout_valid, and dout_parallel.</text>
                                                        <set>
                                                            <object id="cnt" value="4'b0111"/>
                                                            <object id="dout_valid" value="1'b1"/>
                                                            <object id="dout_parallel" value="{din_serial, dout_parallel[7:1]}"/>
                                                        </set>
                                                    </then>
                                                    <else>
                                                        <text>Update cnt and dout_parallel.</text>
                                                        <set>
                                                            <object id="cnt" value="cnt + 1"/>
                                                            <object id="dout_parallel" value="{din_serial, dout_parallel[7:1]}"/>
                                                        </set>
                                                    </else>
                                                </true>
                                            </if>
                                        </then>
                                    </else>
                                </true>
                            </if>
                        </then>
                        <else>
                            <text>Invalid input.</text>
                            <set>
                                <object id="cnt" value="4'b0000"/>
                                <object id="dout_valid" value="1'b0"/>
                            </set>
                        </else>
                    </true>
                </if>
            </else>
        </sequential>
    </implementation>
</module>
